rag_rules: Place input assumptions in component type annexes when they reference component ports
Use assign statements in implementation annexes only for output features or auxiliary variables
Avoid placing guarantees in implementation annexes
Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for input assumptions and output guarantees
generic_rules: Use AGREE annex blocks for component type and implementation contracts
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Avoid range comparisons or 0/1 equality over Boolean, enumeration-like, or opaque data ports
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantees in implementation annexes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
Do not perform range comparisons or 0/1 equality over Boolean, enumeration-like, or opaque data ports
